_description: List B — Best overall regardless of origin (Ollama, local machine). Copy to ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
_mixed_fleet: For PC + Mac Mini, also add the 'ollama-mac-mini' provider block from models-remote.json into the providers object.
_warning: qwen2.5-coder:7b and qwen2.5-coder:14b removed — known incompatibility with Pi. devstral:24b (PC primary) and qwen3-coder:30b (Mac Mini primary) both support tools.

models.name: Devstral 24B
models._notes: PC primary — agentic coder; multi-file edits, 256K context; partial VRAM offload on RTX 3080; supports tools

models.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B (MoE)
models._notes: Mac Mini primary — MoE (3.3B active / 30B total); long-context RAG and agentic loops; 256K context; supports tools
